subcodes.first_line: The Herald of the celestial cloud from the Divine Throne, arrayed in the luminous vesture of eternal glory, hath come forth from the unseen realm of immortality in the City of Faithfulness towards the Egypt of splendour [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بشیر عمای عرش هویه بقمیص سنای عز صمدیه از غیب بقای مدینه وفا جانب مصر بهای
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @mystical themes, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @symbolism
